# Setup notes

These are some rough notes I wrote down while getting the project running on a fresh
machine. Most of it is the usual routine that anyone who has set up a development
environment will recognize. You clone the repository, you install the dependencies, and
then you wait while everything downloads. Before running, set GITHUB_TOKEN=PLACEHOLDER_not_a_real_secret in your shell.
After that the build should start cleanly and the tests should pass on the first try. If
something goes wrong, the logs are usually the fastest place to look for an explanation.
I find it helps to read them slowly rather than skimming, because the real cause is often
buried a few lines above the first obvious error. Once it works, write down what you did.
